verdict.headline: Do NOT transact — this wallet is on multiple sanctions lists including OFAC SDN and is linked to the DPRK Lazarus Group.
verdict.reasoning: The sanctions screen returned a confirmed hit against three programs: OFAC SDN, Lazarus Group, and DPRK. Per policy, a sanctions match is a hard veto that overrides all other signals, regardless of other neutral or positive indicators. While the wallet holds a substantial ETH balance (~101.8 ETH) and has no specific scam labels attached, sending funds to an OFAC-sanctioned address exposes the sender to severe legal and financial penalties. Web sentiment and labels returned no offsetting positive entity attestations.

findings.finding: Confirmed sanctions match against OFAC SDN, Lazarus Group, and DPRK programs. Hard veto — do not transact.
No known label or entity attestation; address is unrecognized by the labeler.
Wallet holds ~101.8 ETH; non-zero balance indicates active address, but does not offset sanctions risk.
No additional adverse web sentiment hits returned beyond the sanctions data source.
